input.user_input: Change the arbitration provision to require AAA rules instead of JAMS. Also change the seat of arbitration from San Francisco to Chicago.

actual:
It appears you have not uploaded or attached the document you would like me to modify. 

If you would like me to edit your specific agreement, please upload the document, and I will gladly update the arbitration provision for you. 

In the meantime, if you are simply looking for the standard language to replace your current JAMS and San Francisco references, you can use the following standard American Arbitration Association (AAA) clause with Chicago as the seat:

**Sample Revised Arbitration Provision:**
> "Any controversy or claim arising out of or relating to this Agreement, or the breach thereof, shall be settled by arbitration administered by the American Arbitration Association in accordance with its Commercial Arbitration Rules. The seat, or legal place, of arbitration shall be Chicago, Illinois. Judgment on the award rendered by the arbitrator(s) may be entered in any court having jurisdiction thereof."
